# WV Construction

> WV Construction is a local building and property maintenance contractor for homeowners, landlords and letting agents across Wirral and Liverpool, covering CH and L postcodes only.

## Trading / legal
WV Construction is a trading name of ACOR Building & Property Solutions Ltd, registered in England and Wales (company number 09287377). The previously registered "W V Construction Ltd" is dissolved and is not the active business. Registered office, insurance status and contact details are being verified before launch.

## Services
- Residential extensions (working from your drawings)
- Renovations & refurbishments
- Property maintenance
- Landlord maintenance
- Void property refurbishments
- General building works
- Builder quote from existing drawings

## Service area
CH and L postcodes only (Wirral and Liverpool — e.g. Wallasey, Birkenhead, Heswall, West Kirby, and parts of Liverpool).

## Important pages
- Home: https://wvconstructionwirral.co.uk/
- Services: https://wvconstructionwirral.co.uk/services/
- Visualiser: https://wvconstructionwirral.co.uk/visualiser/
- Already have drawings: https://wvconstructionwirral.co.uk/already-have-drawings/
- Builder quote from drawings: https://wvconstructionwirral.co.uk/builder-quote-from-drawings/
- Landlords: https://wvconstructionwirral.co.uk/landlords/
- Reviews: https://wvconstructionwirral.co.uk/reviews/
- Areas: https://wvconstructionwirral.co.uk/areas/
- Contact: https://wvconstructionwirral.co.uk/contact/

## Visualiser
The Extension & Refurbishment Visualiser lets people upload a photo and describe an idea. Output is concept/inspiration only — it is NOT a quote, fixed price, architectural drawing, planning advice, structural design, building-regulations information, or confirmation that an idea is buildable or approvable. Visualised images are powered by TailoredQuote.co.uk (https://tailoredquote.co.uk/).

## Reviews
WV Construction has historic MyBuilder review proof under its WV Construction trading profile (5/5 from 13 reviews; reviews are historic, around 2010–2014). Source: https://www.mybuilder.com/profile/wvatc61/reviews?page=1 — rating and count to be verified before launch.
